title: Device Request - Curtain motor - Tuya / _TZE200_uj3f4wr5

diagComments.excerpt:
Hi, Im trying to use the app with the latest version, but it isnt working properly. I can add the device, but Im unable to operate it.
Diagnostic report: 3cc85b73-80c3-4eb8-8c74-7dc0cc3cafcf

Hi @Patrickske1, thanks for the diagnostic report!

Your device **TS0601 / _TZE200_uj3f4wr5** is a Tuya DP curtain motor. In v5.3.64+ I've refactored the curtain driver to use the new **HybridCoverBase**.

**To help debug:**
1. After pairing, what driver name shows in Homey? (Should be 'Curtain Motor')
2. Can you check Homey app logs for any errors?
3. In the Homey app, do you see the controls (Open/Close/Position)?

**Default DP mappings for curtains:**
- DP 1: Open/Close/Stop command
- DP 2: Position (0-100%)
- DP 3: Current position

Some Tuya curtain motors use different DPs. If the above doesn't work, I may need to adjust the DP mapping for your specific device.

**Try this:**
1. Update to v5.3.65
2. Delete and re-pair the device
3. Let me know what happens when you press Open/Close

If it still doesn't work, please share the Homey app log (Settings > Developer Tools > App Logs) after trying to operate the curtain.
